parameters.query:
SELECT c."IdUsu", c."IdOrden", c."Hora", c."Fecha",
  p."Nombre" AS nombre_menor,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") AS telefono_tutor
FROM "DCitas" c
INNER JOIN "Pacientes" p ON p."IdPac" = c."IdPac"
WHERE c."Fecha" = {{ $json.fechaObj }}
  AND c."Recordada" = 0
  AND c."IdSitC" NOT IN (3,4)
  AND p."FecNacim" IS NOT NULL
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(p."FecNacim")) < 14
  AND COALESCE(NULLIF(p."TelMovil",''), p."Tel1") IS NOT NULL

nodes.name: BD · Menores con cita pasado mañana
